title: SmallTotemPack
description: It's Help The pvpers by making the totems small and have smooth animations
body:
## Small Totem Pack

**Small Totem Pack** is a simple resource pack designed for **PvP players** who want a cleaner screen and smoother gameplay.

This pack makes the **Totem of Undying smaller**, so it blocks less of your screen during fights. It also includes **smooth animations**, making the totem look better and feel more polished while playing.

Perfect for players who enjoy **PvP, crystal fights, or fast combat**, where every bit of screen space matters.

### Features

* Smaller **Totem of Undying**
* **Smooth and clean animations**
* Better **screen visibility in PvP**
* Simple and lightweight pack

### Why use this pack?

During PvP, the default totem can take up a lot of screen space. This pack reduces its size so you can **see more of the fight while still keeping the animation smooth and satisfying**.

### Compatibility

* Works with **any PvP or survival gameplay**
* Designed for **Minecraft resource packs**
